## documentation/docs/02-runes/03-$derived.md:49-53
49: ## Understanding dependencies
50: 
51: Anything read synchronously inside the `$derived` expression (or `$derived.by` function body) is considered a _dependency_ of the derived state. When the state changes, the derived will be marked as _dirty_ and recalculated when it is next read.
52: 
53: To exempt a piece of state from being treated as a dependency, use [`untrack`](svelte#untrack).
